title: Sweet Empanadas with Rhubarb Filling
description: A twist on traditional Argentine empanadas with a sweet and tangy rhubarb filling.
instructions: Roll out dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
In a bowl, mix together chopped rhubarb and sugar.
Place a tablespoon of rhubarb mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half over the filling and press edges to seal.
Brush tops with beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Place empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
